msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (First Recension B), Second half of the year
msItem.note: Many leaves are in disorder and detached. The description here follows the original structure of the work. The current presentation of the manuscript is rendered by the folio numbers.

item.desc: Foundation charter describing the founding of the monastery written in another hand from the main hand, but possibly of a similar age. Whether Yǝsḥaq is identical with the Yǝsḥaq mentioned in No item: ESam002#a7 is unclear.
item.q:

t:div.t:ab: ኢትጼሊ፡ ብ፡ ወኢትስአንቲኣሆሙ፡ ወሎሙ፡ አንሰ፡ ኢእእምኔከ፡ በእንቲኣእምድኅረ፡ ፂዋዌ፡ ናእረ፡ ለኢየሩሳሌም፡ ኢምስሌሆሙ፡ ወነትሩፋተ፡ ሕዝብ፡ ሙ፡ ኀበ፡ ምብጽ፡ ይበልጸሎ፡ እስከ፡ ኮኑ፡ አብያብዕሎ፡ ሎሙ፨ ፡ አዕረፈ፡ በሰላም፡ ሀገረ፡ እለ፡ ስክንድ፨ እግዚኣብሔር፡ ይምሐረነ፡ በጸሎቱ፡ ለዓለም፡ አሜን፨ ኦእግዚኦ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ አስተፈሥሕ፡ ልቦ፡ ለአቡነ፡ ናት ወረሲ፡ ዳሕና፡ ወረቶ፡ ምስ
